description: Leather and suede upper for durability and comfort Perforated upper in swoosh pattern on the side panels and on the upper side foot for maximum ventilation Symmetrical lacing system for snug Fit and protection from chaffing Cotton twill laces for comfort and durability Lightly padded tongue for enhanced comfort Reinforced suede overlay along toe guard to protect the forefootCushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection Light EVA midsole for durability and shock absorption High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityHerringbone pattern on outsole for maximum stability and traction
